name: SecurityClaw Security
description: Runtime policy enforcement, transcript sanitization, and audit events for OpenClaw.

configPath.description: Path to the SecurityClaw YAML policy file, relative to the plugin root or absolute.

overridePath.description: Legacy JSON override file path for one-time migration into SQLite; no longer used for ongoing strategy persistence.

dbPath.description: Path to local SQLite database for strategy persistence, runtime status, and decision history.

webhookUrl.description: Optional override for SecurityDecisionEvent webhook delivery.

decisionLogMaxLength.description: Max serialized argument length included in SecurityClaw decision logs.

statusPath.description: Path to runtime status JSON written by SecurityClaw for dashboard monitoring.

adminAutoStart.description: Whether to auto-start SecurityClaw admin dashboard when plugin is loaded (default true).

adminPort.description: Optional admin dashboard listen port. Defaults to SECURITYCLAW_ADMIN_PORT or 4780.
